title: AI Voice OPS
problem: During rush hour, human receptionists answering calls, writing orders, and relaying them to the kitchen creates severe bottlenecks, dropped calls, and lost revenue.
result: An AI agent handles multiple simultaneous calls, takes complex orders flawlessly, and automatically prints the ticket directly in the kitchen. Staff just cooks.

title: Autonomous B2B Outreach Engine
techStack: n8n, Google Sheets, Relevance AI, Gmail API
problem: Writing highly personalized cold emails takes hours per prospect. Scaling outbound campaigns manually while maintaining quality is nearly impossible.
result: An autonomous pipeline that reads leads from a database, scrapes their LinkedIn profiles, analyzes company data using Relevance AI, and fires off highly personalized emails to 50+ ICPs entirely in the background.

title: AI Detailer Web Platform
problem: Detailers miss 3-4 calls a day while working on cars, and customers struggle to figure out which detailing package they actually need based on their car's condition.
result: A fully functional React web app featuring a 24/7 AI chat assistant and an intelligent visual estimator that analyzes car photos to honestly recommend the right package.

title: Ecom AI Shopping Assistant
techStack: LLM Agents, Shopify API, CRM Integration
problem: Ecom websites suffer from high bounce rates because customers cannot easily find the right products or get instant answers to shipping/product questions.
result: A 24/7 intelligent on-site chatbot that guides users to the right products based on their intent, handles support FAQs, and seamlessly captures user emails directly into the store's CRM database.

title: Ecom Abandoned Cart Closer
problem: Ecom brands bleed revenue when customers add items to their cart but bounce due to price hesitation.
result: An outbound AI agent calls the customer, negotiates the price objection, dynamically generates a valid discount code, and texts them a direct checkout link.

title: High-Ticket Home Service Booker
problem: Missing a single call from a homeowner with a plumbing or HVAC emergency means losing a $10,000+ job to a competitor.
result: A 24/7 intelligent dispatcher captures exact addresses, understands complex mechanical problems, and locks in the appointment instantly.
mediaPlaceholder: /images/Restaurant AI Agent fron end (its phone, voice etc).png

title: Ecom Creative Agent
problem: Human designers max out at a few creatives a day. Traditional ad agencies are slow and highly expensive.
result: The agent analyzes competitors and generates 3 to 5 studio-quality ad variants in under a minute directly from a single raw product photo.

title: Airtable Ad Agency Suite
techStack: n8n, Airtable, Gemini API, Web Scraping
problem: Ad agencies waste hours researching products, writing hooks, and manually switching between 10 different tabs and tracking sheets.
result: A single-dashboard Airtable environment. Click one button and it scrapes the FB Ad Library, researches the product, and writes highly converting VSL scripts.

title: Autonomous Content Marketing Engine
problem: Running a multi-channel content strategy requires a massive team of researchers, writers, and social managers. It is expensive, slow, and prone to human error and missed posting schedules.
result: A massive 39-node enterprise architecture that orchestrates multiple AI agents to research trends, write optimized content, distribute it across 6 platforms simultaneously, and track analytics in the HubSpot CRM with built-in error handling.
